title: corynephorus oranensis
intro: Corynephorus oranensis, also known as Oran needle grass, is a type of perennial grass native to North Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and alleviate symptoms of indigestion and bloating. The health benefits of Corynephorus oranensis include its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation. In herbal medicine, Corynephorus oranensis is often prepared in teas or infusions, or used in combination with other herbs to create tinctures or salves for topical application.
